AT 7:45 PM CDT, A TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN NEAR CR 4111 AND CR 4116, PRODUCING EF-2 DAMAGE AT A HOME NEAR THIS LOCATION. THE TORNADO CONTINUE MOVING ENE, SNAPPING NUMEROUS POWER POLES, AND CAUSING DAMAGE TO VEHICLES, MOBILE HOMES, AND OTHER STRUCTURES BEFORE OCCLUDING ON THE NORTH SIDE OF TOWN AROUND 7:55 PM CDT.
